title: Business / Finance Analyst (12 months contract) TCFL
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Support strategic planning and budgeting for enterprise and government businesses, including regular collaboration with key product partners during quarterly reviews and the annual planning cycle.
  • Use management reports, analysis, and data insights to drive effective business targeting and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.
  • Build and maintain forecasting models to monitor business performance, conduct scenario and sensitivity analysis, and improve operational effectiveness through streamlined processes and stronginternal controls.
  • Manage key initiatives and lead regular business reviews (e.g. pipeline or funnel reviews) to maintain visibility and coordinate closely with other business units.
  • Deliver timely and accurate management reports, dashboards, and performance reviews to support growth and business-as-usual decision-making.
  • Ensure timely and accurate month-end closing to maintain proper financial records.
  • Monitor market and industry trends, including developments in enterprise and government sectors and changes within specific industry verticals.

Job Requirements :

  • Degree in in Accounting and/or Financial management    
  • 3-5 years of experiences in Financial analysis / business partnering, working experience in an analytical environment
  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office, especially Excel and PowerPoint, with the ability to manage and analyze large data sets. Experience with Salesforce, Power BI, or Tableau is an advantage.      
  • Proven experience in budgeting, management reporting, and business analysis to support informed decision-making.      
  • Strong cross-functional collaboration and communication skills, with a structured, process-driven approach to managing multiple responsibilities and deliverables.  
  • Solid business acumen with a customer-focused mindset; able to work independently while also being an effective team player.
  • Detail-oriented, dependable, and highly analytical, with strong organizational and multitasking capabilities.
  • Able to perform well under pressure and meet tight deadlines.

Location: Town

Salary : S$5,000.00 – S$7,000.00

Interested applicants, please submit your application to Teresa.chan@persolapac.com

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
